blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 16 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,213 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
